steps.name: Opportunity Intake
steps.description: Capture the deal facts up front so every later stage can reference them.

steps.name: RFP Upload
steps.description: Attach the RFP document and any addenda.

steps.name: Qualification Check
steps.description: Go/no-go: fit, timeline, incumbents, budget signals.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft a qualification assessment (go/no-go). Cover solution fit, timeline feasibility, incumbent risk, and budget signals.

subStages.name: RFP Review
subStages.description: Break the RFP down into what the customer actually needs.

steps.name: Pain Points
steps.description: Stated and implied pain points, ranked.
steps.aiPrompt: Extract and rank the customer's stated and implied pain points from the RFP context.

steps.name: Requirements Extract
steps.description: Functional and non-functional requirements.
steps.aiPrompt: Produce a structured requirements list (functional and non-functional) from the RFP context.

steps.name: Customer Research
steps.description: Org structure, strategy, recent news, tech estate.
steps.aiPrompt: Summarize what a presales architect should know about this customer: strategy, structure, technology estate, recent news.

steps.name: Industry Research
steps.description: Sector trends, regulatory pressures, comparable deals.
steps.aiPrompt: Summarize industry trends, regulatory pressures, and comparable transformation patterns relevant to this opportunity.

subStages.name: Solutioning
subStages.description: Shape the solution against the requirements.

steps.name: Product Alignment
steps.description: Map requirements to product capabilities.
steps.aiPrompt: Map the extracted requirements to product capabilities, flagging strong fits and gaps.

steps.name: Functional Architecture
steps.description: Capability map and process coverage.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft a functional architecture narrative: capability domains, process coverage, personas served.

steps.name: Technical Architecture
steps.description: Integration, data, security, environments.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft a technical architecture narrative: integration approach, data flows, security posture, environment strategy.

steps.name: Fit Gap & Configurations
steps.description: Where config ends and customization begins.
steps.aiPrompt: Produce a fit-gap summary: configuration vs customization vs ISV, with risk notes.

subStages.name: Proposal Draft
subStages.description: Turn the solution into a winning response.

steps.name: Win Themes
steps.description: The three to five reasons we win this deal.
steps.aiPrompt: Propose 3 to 5 win themes grounded in the pain points and solution shape.

steps.name: Executive Summary
steps.description: One page, customer language, outcome led.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft a one-page executive summary in the customer's language, led by business outcomes.

steps.name: Solution Narrative
steps.description: The full response body mapped to RFP sections.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft the solution narrative mapped to the RFP's requirement areas.

steps.name: Pricing Approach
steps.description: Commercial structure and rationale.

steps.name: Demo Script
steps.description: Scenario, personas, talk track, wow moments.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft a demo script: scenario, personas, click path beats, and two wow moments tied to the win themes.

steps.name: Demo Data
steps.description: Realistic records that mirror the customer's world.

steps.name: Demo Build
steps.description: Environment configured and dry run complete.

subStages.name: Orals Prep
subStages.description: Prepare the team to present and defend.

steps.name: Presentation Deck
steps.description: Orals deck built on the win themes.

steps.name: Q&A Prep
steps.description: Anticipated questions and assigned owners.
steps.aiPrompt: Generate the 15 hardest questions the evaluation panel could ask, with suggested answers.

steps.name: Demo Delivery
steps.description: Run the session; capture reactions and objections.

steps.name: Follow-ups
steps.description: Answers, clarifications, supplementary material.

subStages.name: Scope Definition
subStages.description: Pin down what is in and what is out.

steps.name: Scope Statement
steps.description: In-scope, out-of-scope, phase boundaries.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft a scope statement: in-scope, out-of-scope, and phase boundaries based on the solution shape.

steps.name: Assumptions & Dependencies
steps.description: Everything the estimate leans on.

steps.name: Effort Estimate
steps.description: Workstream estimates with confidence levels.

steps.name: Pricing Model
steps.description: T&M, fixed, or hybrid, with rationale.

steps.name: SOW Document
steps.description: Full statement of work draft.

steps.name: Legal Review
steps.description: Redlines resolved, ready for signature.
